case_title: FRANCISCO A TORREZ VS. CLAUDIA DIMAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIMAS, CLAUDIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. ANGEL CARRION INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORREZ, FRANCISCO A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIMAS, CLAUDIA *DEFENDANT, AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT, WAS NOT THE OWNER OF THE VEHICLE INVOLVED IN THE ACCIDENT, PER VEHICLE CODE 5602(A) AND 5602(B)(1). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORREZ, FRANCISCO A ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY TORREZ, FRANCISCO A DIMAS, CLAUDIA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TORREZ, FRANCISCO A AS TO DEFENDANT DIMAS, CLAUDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
